text:
D0500H2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Movement Different Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident is moving or speaking more slowly or the resident is more fidgety or restless. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
154 D0500I1_STF_NGTV_STATE_CD D0500I1_STF_NGTV_STATE_CD D0500I1 Staff
